title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen from Settings for both updates
scenario: New DFU screen design in Settings shows available updates for earbuds and charging case on Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Legend 50
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the Update button on the Home screen.
3. Observe the app navigates to the Settings screen with the SW update tab displayed.
4. Verify the new DFU screen design is shown, listing all available firmware updates for both the earbuds (EB) and charging case (CC).
5. Confirm the user can select which updates to apply (e.g., earbuds, charging case, or both).
expected: The Settings screen opens with the SW update tab showing the new DFU design, listing all available firmware updates for both earbuds and charging case, allowing the user to choose which to update.
